title: ChromaGlint
description: A texture pack that makes the enchantment glint cycle through the colors of the rainbow. 🌈
body:
**This is ChromaGlint.**  
This texture pack changes the enchantment glint from the classic violet to a rainbow color.  

**This texture pack changes the enchantment glint for:**  
- Armor
- Weapons
- Enchanted food
- Basically everything  

**You can also find this on:**  
- [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/chromaglint/)  
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chromaglint/screenshots)  
_By the way, if the usernames are different between platforms and the resource pack, then don't worry. It's all made by me._
